error_pattern: Uniform 5% for 7 sites. vans-nz anomaly: 40% — significantly better than others.
notes: Worst-performing spec and slowest run (8.8h). Root cause: add-to-cart flow is broken (confirmed by add-to-cart spec), causing cascading failures in all tests requiring items in mini-cart. The 3 passing tests per site are likely page-load / structural tests that don't need cart state. vans-nz outlier (40%) is unexplained — may have different product availability on staging or slightly different selector that works. Fix add-to-cart → expect dramatic improvement. Run time of 8.8h due to timeout waits on failing tests.
